case_title: COURNALE & CO. VS. BRANDON HUBBARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68265308) AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68265308) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 677 48TH AVENUE # 4 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94121 SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68265308)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $33.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, BRANDON
